meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop chasing clients without a track record. Learn to deploy a high-converting SaaS starter kit using Antigravity and Claude Code to showcase your engineering.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a failure of perceived authority, not ability. By deploying a high-velocity SaaS starter kit, you create a tangible asset that demonstrates architecture, design, and shipping speed. Use Antigravity to scaffold the infrastructure and Claude Code to iterate features, turning your MVP into a professional, revenue-ready showcase.
content.intro:
The silence from leads is deafening. You have the technical vision to build the next unicorn, but without a portfolio, you are just another voice in the noise. Founders don't hire based on potential; they hire based on evidence. Every day you spend waiting for your first client is a day your competitors are capturing market share.

It is time to manufacture your own authority. By deploying a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you aren't just building a project; you are building a storefront for your engineering prowess. We are moving beyond simple code snippets into the realm of production-grade systems that scream 'expert' to every prospective client or investor who lands on your domain.

steps.title: Architecting the Stack with Antigravity
steps.description: Define the SaaS boilerplate architecture to ensure scalability and ease of maintenance from Day 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust SaaS starter kit using Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Include user authentication, Stripe integration boilerplate, and an RLS-enabled database schema.

steps.title: Automating API Route Generation
steps.description: Establish the backend logic for your SaaS features, focusing on clean, modular API structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a generic CRUD API route structure for a 'Project' entity. Implement proper error handling, Zod validation, and TypeScript interfaces.

steps.title: Integrating Monetization Logic
steps.description: Implement Stripe webhooks to handle subscription lifecycles, proving you can handle production payments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe webhook handler for subscription updates, including logic for handling 'subscription.updated' and 'invoice.payment_succeeded' events.

steps.title: Polishing the UI/UX with AI-Driven Iteration
steps.description: Use Claude Code to refine your dashboard components for a high-end, professional aesthetic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the dashboard sidebar to be responsive, accessible, and follow a sleek, modern SaaS UI design pattern using Shadcn UI components.

steps.title: Deployment and Performance Optimization
steps.description: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to ensure your portfolio site is always live and performant.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel, including build caching.

pro_tips: Focus on 'Feature Flags' early; it shows potential clients you understand how to manage production rollouts without downtime.
Always include a 'Request a Demo' form that triggers an automated email notification; it proves you prioritize lead conversion in your builds.
Use TypeScript strictly; nothing signals an amateur faster than 'any' types in a public-facing codebase.
Write your README as a sales document, not a technical manual. Explain the business value of the features, not just the tech stack.
Include a 'Performance Audit' section in your README with a screenshot of your 100/100 Lighthouse score to build immediate trust.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is live, push it to GitHub, pin it to your profile, and start building a niche-specific micro-SaaS on top of it to prove you can ship real-world solutions.
content.conversion_block: Don't just code; build a business that speaks for itself. Use this starter kit to bridge the gap between 'developer' and 'founder.' Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
